name: ultracompress
summary: Lossless 5-bit transformer compression — 20 PPL-verified architectures (19 transformer + 1 state-space model with comparator-note caveat) across 22 packs shipped (0.6B–405B; dense + MoE + SSM). Public CLI does pack structure + download-integrity checks; the codec is patent-pending and not distributed. BUSL-1.1 + Additional Use Grant.
